npcs.name: Chil
dialogueStages: Seems like you just woke up as well, Pint. Last night's situation is total chaos.
We were both chatting in front of your room until we heard the guard screaming in the direction of the Grand Hall.
We then ran there together, but suddenly an earthquake happened.
I wonder what happened. Oh look! It's Mr. Guard.
He seems to have just woken up as well. Let's talk to him.
Let's hear what the guard wants to say.
I didn't see my sister anywhere here. Based on the guard's words, we should investigate the pond.
He is already in the center of the pond. I can not go there because I'm allergic to lilies.

npcs.name: Guard
npcs.description: The only guard in this complex.
dialogueStages: ...(The guard half consciously staring at you).
May,May...I saw she... leapt into the pond just like that.
I...found May at the bottom of the pool.
Would you help me gather some of May's belongings? I will take her to Chil's place.
I suspected that our lead researcher, Dr. Seegy, is involved in this matter.
I saw May hit him with a brick last night, and when I chased May from the warehouse and waited for her in front of her room, I did not find her.
Then, when I went back, Dr. Seegy was gone. I assumed that he got up and went to his room, as I heard he locked his room.
I then went back to guard the main Researcher Lab door as usual until I heard that...(sigh)
